articles.title: Terra Luna Classic Enjoys Hefty Uptick As Binance Introduces Incredible LUNC Burn Mechanism
articles.description: Luna Classic (LUNC), the renamed native token of the Terra network that infamously crashed to virtually zero in May, is rising in value today as traders bet that the new burn update by Binance could breathe some new life into the much-berated crypto.
